title: Perform chemical pathology tests
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform chemical pathology tests demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Process samples and associated request forms

pcs.text: Identify specimens and request forms that do not comply with workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify specimens and request forms that do not comply with workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify specimens and request forms that do not comply with workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Record any discrepancies or sample quality issues and indicate action required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record any discrepancies or sample quality issues and indicate action required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record any discrepancies or sample quality issues and indicate action required.

pcs.text: Register samples in accordance with workplace procedures, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody traceable to employee
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Register samples in accordance with workplace procedures, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody traceable to employee?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Register samples in accordance with workplace procedures, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody traceable to employee.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Process samples and associated request forms

elements.title: Perform tests

pcs.text: Select authorised tests indicated for the requested investigations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select authorised tests indicated for the requested investigations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select authorised tests indicated for the requested investigations.

pcs.text: Conduct tests in accordance with documented methodologies, applying required quality control procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct tests in accordance with documented methodologies, applying required quality control procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct tests in accordance with documented methodologies, applying required quality control procedures.

pcs.text: Flag test results that are outside accepted quality control limits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Flag test results that are outside accepted quality control limits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Flag test results that are outside accepted quality control limits.

pcs.text: Apply quality control processes to discriminate between significant data and artefact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply quality control processes to discriminate between significant data and artefact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply quality control processes to discriminate between significant data and artefact.

pcs.text: Record all test data and perform required calculations noting any phenomena that may be relevant to the treatment of data or the interpretation of results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record all test data and perform required calculations noting any phenomena that may be relevant to the treatment of data or the interpretation of results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record all test data and perform required calculations noting any phenomena that may be relevant to the treatment of data or the interpretation of results.

pcs.text: Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results.
